name: personal-ai-employee
description: Agent skills for Personal AI Employee - Silver Tier with reasoning, planning, and MCP capabilities

skills.name: process_needs_action_items
skills.description: Process all items in the Needs_Action folder

max_items.description: Maximum number of items to process

skills.name: create_action_from_email
skills.description: Create an action item from an email message

skills.name: update_dashboard
skills.description: Update the AI Employee dashboard with current status

skills.name: check_company_handbook
skills.description: Check the Company Handbook for rules related to a situation

topic.description: Topic to look up in the handbook (e.g., 'payment approval', 'communication guidelines')

skills.name: browse_with_playwright
skills.description: Browse a website and extract content

skills.name: generate_plan
skills.description: Generate a Plan.md file for a task using AI reasoning with context from memory

include_context.description: Include memory context in plan generation

skills.name: execute_skill_chain
skills.description: Execute a predefined skill chain for complex workflows

chain_name.description: Name of the chain to execute (e.g., 'email_triage_chain', 'invoice_request_chain')

initial_context.description: Initial context variables for the chain

skills.name: create_approval_request
skills.description: Create an approval request file for human review (HITL workflow)

action_type.description: Type of action requiring approval (payment, email, social_post, etc.)

skills.name: retrieve_memory_context
skills.description: Retrieve relevant memories for context-aware actions (episodic and semantic memory)

task_type.description: Type of task (email, payment, invoice, etc.)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

skills.name: send_email_via_mcp
skills.description: Send email using MCP server (requires email credentials configuration)

skills.name: post_linkedin_via_mcp
skills.description: Create and post to LinkedIn using MCP server (draft by default, requires API for publishing)

schedule_time.description: ISO format datetime for scheduled posting

skills.name: calculate_priority_score
skills.description: Calculate priority score for a task using Priority Matrix

skills.name: get_decision_statistics
skills.description: Get statistics about pending tasks and decision engine state

chains.name: email_triage_chain
chains.description: Process incoming emails - read, classify, check handbook, create action

chains.name: invoice_request_chain
chains.description: Handle invoice requests - detect, lookup client, generate invoice, send for approval

chains.name: social_post_chain
chains.description: Create and schedule social media posts

chains.name: payment_approval_chain
chains.description: Process payment requests with approval workflow
